steps.title: Write the weight formula and constraint
steps.content:
The whale's weight after $n$ days is:
$$W = 5,800 + 250n$$
This weight must satisfy:
$$8,800 < 5,800 + 250n < 9,800$$

steps.title: Identify integer solutions
steps.content:
Combined: $12 < n < 16$. The integers in this range are $n = 13, 14, 15$.

For $n = 13$: $W = 5,800 + 250(13) = 9,050$. Since \$8,800 < 9,050 < 9,800$, one possible value is $n = 13$.
